patient_summary:
• 73/Female patient
• Primary Dx: Mixed dyslipidemia, Essential HTN, Hyperlipidemia w/ T2DM
• Key Procedures: Colonoscopy with biopsy
• Active Meds: 1 medication including Atorvastatin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Ferritin 266.8 (H); Iron 41 (L); TG 158 (H); eGFR 58 (L)
• Key History: Former smoker (quit 1991) documented
